title: Cornerstone
theological_core: Christ as the rejected stone that became the foundation — strength born from what the world overlooked
aesthetic_direction: Muted earth tones layered over raw concrete textures, architectural negative space, heavyweight drape
typography_layout: Distressed slab-serif at center chest in charcoal, tonal secondary text along hem interior
print_technique: Tonal embroidery front + discharge print back panel
fal_ai_visual_prompt: Luxury heavyweight 300gsm cotton tee, muted earth palette, abstract stone and mortar texture, architectural draping, editorial studio lighting, garment-washed finish, 4:5 AR
novita_video_prompt: 5s slow orbit around hanging garment, fabric physics on heavyweight cotton, warm diffused directional light, shallow depth of field
nano_banana_mockup_prompt: Apply to relaxed-fit drop-shoulder heavyweight tee template, front chest placement, garment-washed charcoal base
promo_hook: Instagram Reels — ambient minimal piano — 'Built different. Built on rock.'
